title: Road Quality / Pothole Tracker MVP — Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation guide for building a local-first road-quality-aware routing MVP with FastAPI, PostGIS/pgRouting, and React/Leaflet.
notes: Date-prefixed filename superficially matched the ADR numbering regex, but content is a sequential implementation plan (Task 1, Task 2, ...) with code snippets, shell commands, and commit instructions. No frontmatter, no Status/Decision/Consequences sections, no user stories, no API contract tables. Path is docs/plans/ not docs/adr/. Classified as DOC (guide/tutorial).
